rationale: 1.6 years total experience as a Business Analyst with no ML/AI engineering background; all five skills are at beginner level with under 13 months each, and the self-described identity is 'marketing manager' — no signal of production ML, retrieval, or ranking systems.

4.8 years of applied ML at product companies (Niramai HealthTech, Locobuzz) including recommendation-style features, XGBoost, and Kubeflow, but the current title is Computer Vision Engineer with no evidence of embeddings-based retrieval, vector databases, NDCG/ranking eval metrics, or hybrid search systems.

7.5 years of experience is mostly frontend/QA (React, TypeScript) at Capgemini (IT services) and Wayne Enterprises (fictional company flag), with AI exposure limited to a small self-built RAG side project and no production ML, retrieval, or ranking systems work.

Despite advanced-level Vector Search and Pinecone skills listed (35 and 18 months respectively), the actual career history is entirely frontend/mobile/DevOps at TCS (IT services) and Stark Industries (fictional company), with no credible production IR or ranking system work supporting those skill claims.

2.9 years as Customer Support at Acme Corp with no ML or engineering work; self-described as a marketing manager with only ChatGPT experimentation, and skills (Sales, Illustrator) have zero relevance to the AI engineering role.

Career is entirely non-technical — Marketing Manager at fictional Initech and Operations Manager at fictional Stark Industries — with no engineering or ML work; beginner-level gRPC and Next.js skills do not offset the complete absence of production AI/ML experience.

3.9 years at Flipkart (e-commerce product company) and Nykaa with advanced skills in Learning to Rank, Information Retrieval (57 months), and LlamaIndex/RAG, plus an IIT Delhi M.Sc in ML — strong IR fundamentals, though relatively short tenure and lighter on production vector-DB and hybrid search operational experience.

11.6 years spanning Business Analyst, Operations Manager, Graphic Designer, and Marketing Manager roles at Pied Piper (fictional), Wipro (IT services), and Acme Corp — no engineering or ML work whatsoever; recent online RAG/vector-DB courses do not compensate for a career with zero technical production experience.

5.6 years entirely in Customer Support and Business Analyst roles at Wayne Enterprises (fictional) and Pied Piper (fictional), with skills limited to MongoDB and Excel at intermediate level; no ML, retrieval, or ranking engineering experience of any kind.

9.8 years of experience but almost entirely frontend/DevOps/QA work at TCS (IT services), Swiggy, and Stark Industries (fictional); advanced MLOps and Weights & Biases skills plus intermediate FAISS show some relevant exposure, but no production retrieval/ranking system work and the RAG experience is limited to a self-described side project.
